notes: All 4 Tier 3 sources documented as: registration-walled (NIBRS), substituted in Tier 1 (NVDRS via psx4-wq38, BIA via TIGER AIANNH), or requires per-state acquisition (property tax).

sources.notes: psx4-wq38 covers same NCHS-derived totals at county level.
Requires api.data.gov key or ICPSR registration.
No unified national source; Tax Foundation summaries available as proxy.
